name: Linguine with Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 10 oz can of minced clams with liquid
1/4 cup chopped parsley (omit if fresh is not available)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook linguine according to package directions, ensuring it is al dente but not overcooked.
2. While the pasta cooks, heat oil in a skillet.
3. Saute garlic and onions until soft but not browned.
4. Add clams with liquid, parsley, lemon juice, and hot pepper sauce.
5. Heat through for about 1-2 minutes.
6. Drain linguine; place on a platter and pour clam sauce over it.
7. Sprinkle with Parmesan cheese as desired.
8. Yields 2 servings.
